title: SignalEnvelope
description: Shared shape any skill must produce when writing customer-related output into the data foundation (currently polym-sa-wiki).

customer_key.description: stable id joining all signals for a customer; resolved via the customer source-of-truth table

signal_type.description: 'correction' is reserved for proposed edits to existing wiki content

source_url.description: deep link back to the original material (lark://, https://, etc.)

content_md.description: the substantive content, Markdown; wiki-manage applies desensitisation rules to this field

supersedes.description: if this signal replaces a prior one, the prior signal's id
